title: ListPicker

AllowEmptySelection.description:
Allows the user to close the picker without selecting a value or to clear all existing selections.
On Android, this property is ignored and empty selection is always allowed.

AllowMultipleSelection.description: Allows user to select more than one value from the list.

DisplayOnBar.description: Indicate whether the control should always be displayed on the FilterBar even when not selected.

Label.description: The label displayed for the control on the FilterBar and within the FilterBar dialog.

PickerItems.description: An array of items for this picker.

Value.description: When not specified or not found in the `PickerItems` no selection is made. An array of the above values can be used to specify multiple selection.

description: A list picker allows the selection of one or more options among values within a defined category.
